diff:
diff --git a/src/backend_loader.py b/src/backend_loader.py
index 647810d..e3200da 100644
--- a/src/backend_loader.py
+++ b/src/backend_loader.py
@@ -2,5 +2,19 @@ import importlib
 
 
 def load_backend(name: str):
-    module = importlib.import_module(name)
+    """Load a backend implementation by name.
+
+    Supports short names (e.g. "memory") which are resolved to
+    the package-local modules in ``src.backends``.
+    Also accepts fully qualified module paths.
+    Raises ValueError if the backend cannot be found.
+    """
+    # Resolve short names to package-local backend modules
+    if "." not in name:
+        name = f"src.backends.{name}"
+    try:
+        module = importlib.import_module(name)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        # Convert all import-related errors to ValueError
+        raise ValueError(f"Backend '{name}' not found") from exc
     return module.Backend()
